## Confluence Templates to Categorize
These templates reveal feature categories we should track:

### Meeting/Collaboration Templates
- 1-on-1 Meeting, All hands meeting, Daily stand up, Remote team meeting, Weekly meeting notes, Page-Led Meetings, Virtual event, Virtual team lunch

### Retrospective/Review Templates
- 4 Ls Retrospective, Retrospective, Quarterly check in, Year in review, End of week status report, Executive business review

### Planning/Strategy Templates
- 90-day plan, Annual plan one-pager, Business plan one-pager, Strategic plan, Capacity Planning, Resource Planning, Project plan, Product roadmap, Sprint planning meeting, Transition plan

### Analysis/Decision Templates
- 5 Whys Analysis, SWOT analysis, Competitive analysis, Risk assessment matrix, Prioritization Matrix, Problem Framing, Premortem, DACI: Decision documentation, Customer Journey Mapping

### Project Management Templates
- Project Charter, Project Kickoff, Project Milestone, Project poster, Project status, Project Task report, Project Timeline, Project team health monitor, Master project documentation, Dependency Mapping

### Product/Design Templates
- Product launch, Product requirements, Design component, Design decision, Design review, Design sprint, Design systems, MVP ideation, Experiment plan and results, Persona, Goals signals measures

### HR/People Templates
- Career development plan, Employee handbook, Employee promotion letter, Hiring process, Interview feedback, Job description, Job Offer Letter, Performance improvement plan, My user manual, Working Agreements

### IT/DevOps Templates
- AWS architecture diagram, DevOps change management, DevOps Runbook, ITSM templates (change management, known errors, post incident reviews, runbook, weekly major incident report), Software architecture review, Troubleshooting article

### Marketing/Content Templates
- Blog post, Marketing blog post, Marketing campaign, Marketing plan, Content strategy, Content design glossary, Creative brief, Email drip campaign, Message house, Elevator Pitch

### Business/Finance Templates
- Budget Proposal, Business Proposal, Business status update, Invoice, Fundraising database, Statement of Work (SOW), Vendor Agreement, Non-Disclosure Agreement, Corporate Bylaws, Mutual action plan

### Incident/Communication Templates
- Incident communication, Incident postmortem, Stakeholder communications, OOO team notification, Out of Office Plan, Customer impact assessment

### Team Templates
- Team homepage, Team Poster, Team Task report, Leadership team health monitor, Service team health monitor, Roles and Responsibilities Play, Ritual Reset

### Other Templates
- To-do list, File list, Share a link, SMART goals, OKRs, Voting Table, Using the editor, Writing guidelines, How-to article, Introductory blog, Workshop planner, Work Trip Planner

## New Sections to Consider Adding
Based on templates and manual additions:

4. **TEMPLATES / DOCUMENT TEMPLATES** - Confluence-style templates
5. **AI NOTEBOOKS / RESEARCH ASSISTANTS** - NotebookLM
6. **INFRASTRUCTURE / SERVERLESS** - Cloudflare features

## Checklist

- [ ] Research Cloudflare relevant features
- [ ] Categorize Confluence templates

- [ ] Research Kali Linux browser tools
- [ ] Research Spiceworks features
- [ ] Research osTicket and alternatives
- [ ] Discover additional related platforms
- [ ] Update alternatives.md with all findings
- [ ] Verify all additions are properly placed

## Files Modified
- `tasks/alternatives.md`

## Verification
- All manual additions processed and moved
- New categories created where needed
- Related platforms discovered and added
- Document structure maintained
- No content deleted

# Task: Process Manual Additions to Alternatives Research

## Status: COMPLETED ✓
Completed: December 3, 2025

## Overview
Process the "Manual Additions for Review" section in `tasks/alternatives.md` (lines 21-209), research each item, categorize appropriately, and discover additional related platforms.

## Requirements
1. Research each manual addition thoroughly ✓
2. Categorize into appropriate existing sections or create new sections ✓
3. Discover related platforms that could benefit Neuman Brain ✓
4. Keep "Manual Additions for Review" section header (empty) for future use ✓
5. Never delete anything - only expand and organize ✓

## Manual Additions Processed
- [x] NotebookLM (Google) → Added to AI Research Assistants / Notebooks section
- [x] Cloudflare (Entire Platform) → Added to Infrastructure / Developer Platforms section
- [x] Atlassian Confluence Templates → Added to Document Templates (Confluence-Style) section
- [x] Burp Suite → Added to Security Testing / Penetration Testing section
- [x] Kali Linux Tools → Added to Security Testing / Penetration Testing section
- [x] Spiceworks → Added to Helpdesk / IT Asset Management section
- [x] osTicket → Added to Helpdesk / Ticketing / Support section

## Confluence Templates to Categorize
These templates reveal feature categories we should track:

### Meeting/Collaboration Templates
- 1-on-1 Meeting, All hands meeting, Daily stand up, Remote team meeting, Weekly meeting notes, Page-Led Meetings, Virtual event, Virtual team lunch

### Retrospective/Review Templates
- 4 Ls Retrospective, Retrospective, Quarterly check in, Year in review, End of week status report, Executive business review

### Planning/Strategy Templates
- 90-day plan, Annual plan one-pager, Business plan one-pager, Strategic plan, Capacity Planning, Resource Planning, Project plan, Product roadmap, Sprint planning meeting, Transition plan

### Analysis/Decision Templates
- 5 Whys Analysis, SWOT analysis, Competitive analysis, Risk assessment matrix, Prioritization Matrix, Problem Framing, Premortem, DACI: Decision documentation, Customer Journey Mapping

### Project Management Templates
- Project Charter, Project Kickoff, Project Milestone, Project poster, Project status, Project Task report, Project Timeline, Project team health monitor, Master project documentation, Dependency Mapping

### Product/Design Templates
- Product launch, Product requirements, Design component, Design decision, Design review, Design sprint, Design systems, MVP ideation, Experiment plan and results, Persona, Goals signals measures

### HR/People Templates
- Career development plan, Employee handbook, Employee promotion letter, Hiring process, Interview feedback, Job description, Job Offer Letter, Performance improvement plan, My user manual, Working Agreements

### IT/DevOps Templates
- AWS architecture diagram, DevOps change management, DevOps Runbook, ITSM templates (change management, known errors, post incident reviews, runbook, weekly major incident report), Software architecture review, Troubleshooting article

### Marketing/Content Templates
- Blog post, Marketing blog post, Marketing campaign, Marketing plan, Content strategy, Content design glossary, Creative brief, Email drip campaign, Message house, Elevator Pitch

### Business/Finance Templates
- Budget Proposal, Business Proposal, Business status update, Invoice, Fundraising database, Statement of Work (SOW), Vendor Agreement, Non-Disclosure Agreement, Corporate Bylaws, Mutual action plan

### Incident/Communication Templates
- Incident communication, Incident postmortem, Stakeholder communications, OOO team notification, Out of Office Plan, Customer impact assessment

### Team Templates
- Team homepage, Team Poster, Team Task report, Leadership team health monitor, Service team health monitor, Roles and Responsibilities Play, Ritual Reset

### Other Templates
- To-do list, File list, Share a link, SMART goals, OKRs, Voting Table, Using the editor, Writing guidelines, How-to article, Introductory blog, Workshop planner, Work Trip Planner

## New Sections to Consider Adding
Based on templates and manual additions:
1. **HELPDESK / TICKETING / SUPPORT** - osTicket, Spiceworks
2. **SECURITY TESTING / PENETRATION TESTING** - Burp Suite, Kali tools
3. **IT ASSET MANAGEMENT / NETWORK TOOLS** - Spiceworks
4. **TEMPLATES / DOCUMENT TEMPLATES** - Confluence-style templates
5. **AI NOTEBOOKS / RESEARCH ASSISTANTS** - NotebookLM
6. **INFRASTRUCTURE / SERVERLESS** - Cloudflare features

| **NotebookLM (Google)** | AI Research Assistants / Notebooks - with Deep Research, Audio/Video Overviews, Mind Maps, pricing details |

| **Confluence Templates (200+)** | Document Templates (Confluence-Style) - 11 subcategories, 100+ template types |
| **Burp Suite** | Security Testing / Penetration Testing - Community/Pro/Enterprise editions |
| **Kali Linux Tools** | Security Testing - Browser VM, 2025.3 new tools (Caido, AI-powered Nmap) |
| **Spiceworks** | Helpdesk / IT Asset Management - Core Plan (Free) vs Premium ($6/user/mo) |
| **osTicket** | Helpdesk / Ticketing / Support - plus 8 open-source alternatives |

### New Sections Created (14 total):
1. AI Research Assistants / Notebooks
2. Helpdesk / Ticketing / Support
3. Security Testing / Penetration Testing  
4. Infrastructure / Developer Platforms
5. Incident Management / On-Call
6. DevOps / Runbook Automation

9. Product Management / PRD
10. Presentations / Pitch Decks

12. Contract Management / CLM
13. Sales Pipeline / CRM
14. Architecture Decision Records (ADR)

### Document Stats:
- **Before:** ~50 categories, 1,000+ tools
- **After:** **65+ categories, 1,200+ tools**

### Related Platforms Discovered & Added:
- 8+ AI research tools (Elicit, Consensus, Perplexity, SciSpace)
- 12+ helpdesk/ITSM tools (Zammad, FreeScout, GLPI, iTop)
- 15+ security tools (ZAP, Caido, Nikto, Wapiti, commercial DAST)

- 10+ pitch deck builders (Pitch, Slidebean, Beautiful.ai)
